title: Universal infant free school meals (UIFSM): 2025 to 2026
body: "Universal infant free school meals (UIFSM) provides funding for all government funded schools to offer free school meals to pupils in reception, year 1 and year 2.   Schools and local authorities must follow the terms and conditions set out in the conditions of grant.  Published allocations  We have published the provisional UIFSM allocations for the 2025 to 2026 academic year and added the allocations for new openers.  "

taxons.title: Pupil premium and other school premiums
